data.title: Russia’s Sberbank launches digital asset based on Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description:
Sberbank has come up with another investment option for Russians who want to bet their money on major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum without actually owning them. The banking giant will pitch its new product to Russia’s young market for digital assets and derivatives that has been growing with the nod of the country’s generally […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russias-sberbank-launches-digital-asset-based-on-bitcoin-and-ethereum/

data.title: US dollar posts longest losing streak since April 2023 after labor market shock
data.description:
The dollar just recorded its fifth straight week of losses, the worst losing streak since April 2023. This drop followed a weak U. S. labor market report that hit traders like a freight train. The Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index slumped as much as 0. 7% on Friday, locking in another brutal week for the currency. So far […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-dollar-longest-losing-streak-since-2023/

data.title: Are the stocks of ETH treasury companies really a bargain?
data.description:
ETH treasury companies saw their mNAV metric sink below 1. 0. Experts warned those levels did not mean stocks like BMNR and SBET were a bargain for ETH exposure.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/are-the-stocks-of-eth-treasury-companies-really-a-bargain/

data.title: Apart from Justin Sun’s wallet, World Liberty Financial has blacklisted over 270 additional wallets
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the DeFi project linked to the US President Donald Trump, has blacklisted more than 200 wallet addresses since it started trading on Sept. 1. On Sept. 4, Galaxy researcher Zach Pokorny reported that the DeFi venture had blocked 272 wallet addresses within its first week of trading
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/apart-from-justin-suns-wallet-world-liberty-financial-has-blacklisted-over-270-additional-wallets/

data.title: SOL Strategies: The First Solana Treasury Company Listed On Nasdaq
data.description:
In a landmark development for the Solana (SOL) ecosystem, SOL Strategies has received approval for its listing on the Nasdaq, marking a significant milestone as the first treasury company associated with SOL to achieve this status. The company is set to begin trading under the ticker symbol “STKE” on September 9, 2025. SOL Strategies Set To Make Nasdaq Debut Upon its Nasdaq debut, SOL Strategies will continue to maintain its presence on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) under the symbol “HODL. ” Notably, shares currently trading on the OTCQB Venture Market under the symbol “CYFRF” will automatically convert to the Nasdaq listing
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/sol-strategies-the-first-solana-treasury-company-listed-on-nasdaq/

data.title: Crypto To Explode Higher Amid a ‘Powerful’ Altcoin Season, Predicts Economist Henrik Zeberg – But There’s a Catch
data.description:
Economist and macro strategist Henrik Zeberg is predicting that the crypto markets will see a massive surge to the upside as a powerful altcoin season looms. In a new thread, Zeberg tells his 196,600 followers on X that support from the Federal Reserve will cause a powerful altcoin season and send the crypto markets skyrocketing.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/05/crypto-to-explode-higher-amid-a-powerful-altcoin-season-predicts-economist-henrik-zeberg-but-theres-a-catch/

The transaction, valued at roughly $178 million at current prices, was structured as a 50% stock and 50% cash exchange, according to the Sept
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tmtg-acquires-684m-cro-tokens-as-part-of-crypto-com-partnership/
